title: OpenAI's head of health lays out the AI giant’s healthcare ambitions
description:
OpenAI is launching ChatGPT for Clinicians, a free tool for doctors, nurse practitioners, physician assistants and pharmacists.

 It’s the latest product the AI giant has launched within healthcare, after the company announced ...

title: How SpaceX preempted a $2B fundraise with a $60B buyout offer
description: Cursor was on track to close a $2 billion funding round this week but chose to halt discussions after SpaceX offered a $10 billion "collaboration fee" and a path to a $60 billion acquisition.

title: SpaceX Will Buy Cursor
description: Cursor is already at ~$2 Billion ARR (annual recurring revenue as of February 2026) and was on track to triple to over $6 billion ARR by the end of 2026 even before the xAI deal. The brand-new partnership with xAI/SpaceX gives them massive Colossus supercomputer access, which removes their biggest r

title: Rivian (RIVN) starts R2 production days after tornado hit factory, deliveries this spring
description:
Rivian officially started production of its R2 electric SUV at its Normal, Illinois plant today, marking the most critical milestone in the company’s history.



The production launch comes just five days after an EF-1 tornado ripped through the same facility, collapsing a section of the roof in Bui

title: OpenAI teams up with Infosys to bring AI tools to more businesses
description: Infosys said the integration will be used to help its clients modernize software development, automate workflows, and deploy AI systems, initially focusing software engineering, legacy modernization, and DevOps.

title: HII partners with Path Robotics, GrayMatter Robotics to accelerate shipbuilding
description:
GrayMatter Robotics and Path Robotics are both deepening their existing relationship with HII, one of the country's leading shipbuilders.
The post HII partners with Path Robotics, GrayMatter Robotics to accelerate shipbuilding appeared first on The Robot Report.

title: Join Our Livestream: Musk v. Altman and the Future of OpenAI
description: On May 8, we’re going live to answer your questions about the Musk v. Altman trial that could determine the fate of OpenAI.

title: ATMOS Space Cargo secures €25.7M Series A to expand Europe’s sovereign return-from-orbit capability
description: ATMOS Space Cargo, a European company developing orbital transport and re-entry vehicles, has closed a €25.7 million Series A financing round.  The funding will support an initial three-vehicle PHOENI...

title: Vietnam’s VinDynamics, Germany’s Schaeffler to jointly advance humanoid robotics development
description: VinDynamics, a robotics company under Vietnam's conglomerate Vingroup, and Germany's motion technology firm Schaeffler will collaborate on research and development in humanoid robotics.

title: Saildrone announces new USV class aimed at anti-submarine warfare
description: Spectre, a new class of unmanned surface vessel, will face sea trials in early 2027.

title: OpenAI Beefs Up ChatGPT’s Image Generation Model
description: The ChatGPT Images 2.0 model is here. Our testing shows it’s better at creating more detailed images and rendering text, but it still struggles with languages other than English.

title: Mozilla Used Anthropic’s Mythos to Find and Fix 271 Bugs in Firefox
description: The Firefox team doesn’t think emerging AI capabilities will upend cybersecurity long term, but they warn that software developers are likely in for a rocky transition.

title: Anthropic and Status of AI Data Centers
description: Amazon announced an additional $5 billion investment in Anthropic immediately, plus up to $20 billion more in the future (tied to commercial milestones). title: Foxconn to manufacture humanoid robots in Vietnam
description: Fushan Technology (Vietnam), a subsidiary of Foxconn (also known as Hon Hai Precision Industry), is seeking permission to manufacture humanoid robots in its factory in Vietnam's northern province of Bac Ninh.

title: SpaceX Falcon 9 Almost Only Rocket for AST Space Mobile, Amazon LEO and Space Force
description: Blue Origin New Glenn is likely grounded for 4 months to investigate the upper stage failure on the weekend. ULA Vulcan is grounded because of two Grumman solid rocket booster failures. A Humanoid Robot Set a Half-Marathon Record in China
description: An autonomous robot from the company Honor ran a half marathon in 50:26, beating the human record by 7 minutes.

title: AST Spacemobile BB7 Is Not Recoverable Per ASTS
description: ASTS admits the satellite is too low and cannot be saved. Based on what the orbit appears to be. 20kg of fuel they can only raise it part of the way. title: Rivian partners with Tesla co-founder’s Redwood on energy storage
description:
Rivian is partnering with Redwood Materials, the battery company founded by Tesla co-founder JB Straubel, to build a second-life battery energy storage system at its EV manufacturing plant in Normal, Illinois.
